The Abandonment Rate is consistently higher than the conversion rate for every week shown. A dotted blue horizontal line runs across the chart, indicating an average Abandonment Rate of 67.21%. Specific values are annotated on the bars, with circular markers highlighting the maximum value of 73.2% in Week 03 and the minimum value of 61.3% in Week 12. Conversely, the Checkout Conversion Rate is represented by shorter purple bars. A dashed purple horizontal line marks the average Checkout Conversion Rate at 32.79%. This metric shows an inverse trend to the abandonment rate, reaching its lowest point of 26.8% in Week 03 and peaking at 38.7% in Week 12, both of which are also highlighted with <HALLUCINATION>circular</HALLUCINATION> markers. The sum of the two values for any given week <HALLUCINATION>approximates</HALLUCINATION> 100%.

natural.description_tag: This dual-axis combination chart, titled "Product Return Rates by Category," displays data across twelve product categories listed on the x-axis: Electronics, Apparel, Home & Kitchen, Beauty, Sports, Toys, Groceries, Books, Footwear, Furniture, Pet Supplies, and Automotive. A dashed blue line with a light blue shaded area underneath tracks the "Return Rate," with percentage values labeled above each data point. Visually, categories with high return volumes, such as Apparel and Footwear, also exhibit the highest return rates.

natural.description_tag: This image displays a line chart titled "Online Conversion Funnel Analysis" with a subtitle reading "Simulated session-to-purchase performance." The vertical axis represents percentages from 0% to 100% in 20% increments, while the horizontal axis lists sequential stages: Landing View, Product View, Add to Cart, Checkout Start, Shipping Info, Payment Info, Order Review, and Purchase. A dashed line connects data points indicating the retention rate at each stage. Starting at 100% for Landing View, the line drops to 62.8% at Product View and further to 18.9% at Add to Cart. The decline stabilizes somewhat as the line proceeds to 12.6% at Checkout Start, 10.2% at Shipping Info, 8.7% at Payment Info, 7.4% at Order Review, and finally 6.1% at Purchase. The chart background is divided into shaded vertical sections. The area between Product View and <HALLUCINATION>Checkout Start</HALLUCINATION> is shaded orange and labeled "Biggest Drop-Off" at the top. The section from Checkout Start to Payment Info <HALLUCINATION>is also</HALLUCINATION> shaded orange and labeled "Checkout Friction." The initial and final sections of the chart are shaded in light green.
